name: S&T BANCORP INC
business: S&T Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company that provides consumer, commercial and small business banking services, including deposit accounts, loans, brokerage services, and trust services. It operates through S&T Bank with 72 branches in Pennsylvania and Ohio.

exposures.sentence: The financial services industry is constantly undergoing rapid technological change with frequent introductions of new technology-driven products and services, including the use of artificial intelligence and digital assets.

A cyber attack, information or security breach, or a failure of ours or of a third-party's infrastructure, computer and data management systems could adversely affect our ability to conduct our business or manage our exposure to risk, result in the disclosure or misuse of confidential or proprietary information, increase our costs to maintain and update our operational and security systems and infrastructure, and adversely impact our results of operations, liquidity and financial condition, as well as cause diminished customer, employee or investor confidence.
Furthermore, the potential development of quantum computing capabilities poses future risks to existing cryptographic standards which could jeopardize the integrity of our secure data transmissions.

Accordingly, digital asset service providers, who currently are not subject to the same extensive regulation as banking organizations and other financial institutions, have become potential competitors for our customers' banking business.
